titleStmt.title: SII 5.1342: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1342. (A.R. No. 387 of 1896). ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE PRAKARA OF THE SURYANARAYANA TEMPLE AT ARASAVILLI; SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[¿] svasti . samaramukhānēkaripuda¨rppama¨rddana bhuja
balaparākrama paramamāhēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara gaṁggānva
yāvalaṁbanastaṁbha śrīmadanaṁtava¨rmmadēvara prava¨rddha
māna vijayarājyasaṁvatsa 58 śrāhi mēṣa śuklapakṣa
Akṣatritīyamu budhavāramu modalugā śrīpā
damula prasādamuna māliyanāyaka rājanārā
yaṇa gaṁggakulatilaka vaiśyamārāyani koḍku śrīka
raṇa rācapaḍihattu puravari sūrapōtu A¨rṣave
lligrāmamunandu padipuṭla bhūmi tāṁbraśāsana
mu Akaramugāṁ baḍasi dīnilō nēnuvuṭla bhūmi ga
ṁgganārāyaṇabrahmadēyamuna mādhavaṣaḍaṁggavula ko
ḍku modalugānēvuru brāhmaṇulaku Agrāsanamunaku
vidyāchatramunakuṁgā nicci Iṁdda sītuṁgālamuna
ku Aguṣṭiyu ḍākālamunakuṁ jalivaṁddi
riyuṁ beṭṭiṁci yūri paḍmaṭaprāṁttabaṁṭṭa peddaceṟuvu
gā groppiṁciti ĪShort I is used here with the mark for length.dha¨rmmuvu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu sariṁppaṁgalaAdi
dīnikevvarēni vakramainavāru gajavirajamahē
ṁdramula Adha¨rmmuvu sēsi Adōgati
ṁ boṁdaṁgalavārani silālikhita
musēsi sthāpiṁccina staṁbhamū .
Digital edition of SII 5.1342 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
